textbox.text: Faces showed up almost instantly, so the matter of pressing "j" was not a performance issue. During experiment I tried to focus my sight on "cross" all the time, but sometimes after "+" disappeared and the face got green border after pressing J, I started to notice some differences in the same faces like. the size and position of the eyes, the shape of the jaw, or some sort of superimposition of images. This influenced my overall judgment a bit, although I tried to base it on my first impression
